embeds.title: User blog:SlingingDart612/the operator tower ((N!)  +1338)
embeds.description: Created page with "== The Operator Tower \(Essay\) == Okay, I'm back at it with a new essay that no one except me will read.  The [Operator](<https://tds.fandom.com/wiki/Operator>) tower, for context, is the Evolved version of the Scout. It is highly unique compared to other towers in TDS. Its first unique mechanic is [Coordination](<https://tds.fandom.com/wiki/Coordination>). This buff boosts the damage of an Operator if other Operators are within its Coordination range. Its second unique mechanic is [Shared Optics](<https://tds.fandom.com/wiki/Shared_Optics>). This allows an Operator to fire into the range of..."
